name: @agent-desktop-harness/core
description: Core engine for isolated desktop sessions, driver routing, evidence, visual QA, and live observer coordination.

scripts.test: pnpm build && node --test dist/session/displayAllocator.test.js dist/policy/PolicyValidator.test.js dist/evidence/EvidenceStore.test.js dist/input/XdotoolInputBackend.test.js dist/window/WmctrlWindowBackend.test.js dist/session/SessionManager.input.test.js dist/session/SessionManager.stable.test.js dist/session/SessionManager.visualHardening.test.js dist/drivers/browser/browserSelectors.test.js dist/drivers/browser/PlaywrightBrowserDriver.test.js dist/drivers/tauri/tauriStatus.test.js dist/drivers/tauri/TauriWebDriverDriver.test.js dist/drivers/electron/electronStatus.test.js dist/drivers/router/driverSelection.test.js dist/visual/imageDiff.test.js dist/visual/VisualQaService.test.js dist/visual/geometry.test.js dist/observer/NoVncObserver.test.js
